item.name: Splendid Pondfrond
item.description:
A firm favorite of fruit worms, despite their apparent inability to plumb the depths of the lake where it grows. However, a hook through the belly awakes within them their innate swimming instincts, and they will stop at nothing to locate this elusive pond weed.

※Only for use in Qitari society quests.
※Not included in the fish guide.
